package WurstExportedObjects_w3a
import ObjEditingNatives
import AbilityObjEditing

// Modified Table (contains all custom objects)

@compiletime function create_w3a_A000()
	new AbilityDefinitionHardenedSkin('A000')
	..setIgnoredDamage(1, 10.0)
	..setRequirements("R000")
	..setCheckDependencies(false)
	..setName("Thicker Bark")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNEatTree.blp")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Thicker Bark")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Reduces all attacks on the Treant by 10 damage. Attacks cannot be reduced below <Assk,DataB1> damage.")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)


@compiletime function create_w3a_A001()
	new AbilityDefinitionPitLordCleavingAttack('A001')
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "With each devastating swipe, Ursoc rends all who stand nearby, dealing <ANca,DataA1,%>% of his attack damage to enemies around his target.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "With each devastating swipe, Ursoc rends all who stand nearby, dealing <ANca,DataA2,%>% of his attack damage to enemies around his target.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "With each devastating swipe, Ursoc rends all who stand nearby, dealing <ANca,DataA3,%>% of his attack damage to enemies around his target.")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Ursoc's Wrath|cff000000|r - [|cffffcc00Level 1|r]")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Ursoc's Wrath - [|cffffcc00Level 2|r]")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Ursoc's Wrath - [|cffffcc00Level 3|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("With each devastating swipe, Ursoc rends all who stand nearby. |n|n|cffffcc00Level 1|r - <ANca,DataA1,%>% damage is splash. |n|cffffcc00Level 2|r - <ANca,DataA2,%>% damage is splash. |n|cffffcc00Level 3|r - <ANca,DataA3,%>% damage is splash.")
	..setTooltipLearn("Learn Ursoc's Wrath - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setName("Ursoc's Wrath")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNBearForm.blp")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(1)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(1)


@compiletime function create_w3a_A002()
	new AbilityDefinitionMountainKingThunderClap('A002')
	..setAOEDamage(1, 100.0)
	..setAOEDamage(2, 150.0)
	..setAOEDamage(3, 225.0)
	..setAttackSpeedReduction(1, 0.25)
	..setAttackSpeedReduction(2, 0.35)
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 300.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(2, 350.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(3, 400.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "B000")
	..setBuffs(2, "B000")
	..setBuffs(3, "B000")
	..setName("Ground Slam")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Ground Slam - [|cffffcc00Level 1|r]")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Ground Slam - [|cffffcc00Level 2|r]")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Ground Slam - [|cffffcc00Level 3|r]")


@compiletime function create_w3a_A003()
	new AbilityDefinitionSearingArrowscreep('A003')
	..setMissileSpeed(1100)
	..setRequirements("R001")
	..setCheckDependencies(true)
	..setRace("nightelf")
	..setDamageBonus(1, 15.0)
	..setName("Impetus")
	..setMissileArt("war3mapImported\\VirgasArc_v1.mdx")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Impetus")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Adds <ACsa,DataA1> bonus magical damage to an attack against enemies, but drains mana with each attack.")
	..setMissileArc(0.5)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)


@compiletime function create_w3a_A004()
	new AbilityDefinitionAuraBrilliancecreep('A004')
	..setManaRegenerationIncrease(1, 1.5)
	..setName("Brilliance Aura Moonkin")


@compiletime function create_w3a_A005()
	new AbilityDefinitionTinkererDemolishLevel0('A005')
	..setRace("nightelf")
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setRequirements("R004")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)


@compiletime function create_w3a_A006()
	new AbilityDefinitionBladeMasterCriticalStrike('A006')
	..setChancetoCriticalStrike(1, 5.0)
	..setChancetoCriticalStrike(2, 10.0)
	..setRace("nightelf")
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setRequirements("R008")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Gives a 5% chance to do 2 times normal damage on an attack.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "Gives a 10% chance to do 3 times normal damage on an attack.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "Gives a 15% chance to do 4 times normal damage on an attack.")


@compiletime function create_w3a_A007()
	new AbilityDefinitionPolymorphcreep('A007')
	..setDurationHero(1, 3.0)
	..setName("Polymorph (Neutral Hostile)")


@compiletime function create_w3a_A008()
	new AbilityDefinitionBloodMageSiphonMana('A008')
	..setLevels(1)
	..setHeroAbility(false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_A009()
	new AbilityDefinitionWardenBlink('A009')
	..setLevels(1)
	..setMaximumRange(1, 800.0)
	..setHeroAbility(false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_A00A()
	new AbilityDefinitionDemonHunterManaBurn('A00A')
	..setLevels(1)
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setMaxManaDrained(1, 100.0)
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Sends a bolt of negative energy that burns up to 100  points of a target enemy unit's mana. The mana combusts, dealing damage equal to the amount of mana burned.")
	..setHotkeyNormal("V")


@compiletime function create_w3a_A00B()
	new AbilityDefinitionBladeMasterWindWalk('A00B')
	..setLevels(1)
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 30.0)
	..setCooldown(1, 50.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 30.0)
	..setBackstabDamage1(1, 75.0)
	..setMovementSpeedIncrease(1, 0.0)
	..setTransitionTime(1, 1.0)
	..setName("Prowl")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("Allows the Elder Nightsaber to become invisible, move through units, although slowly for a set amount of time. When the Nightsaber attacks a unit to break invisibility, he will deal a bonus 75 physical damage.")


@compiletime function create_w3a_A00C()
	new AbilityDefinitionCoupleInstantArcher('A00C')
	..setPartnerUnitType(1, "n008")
	..setResultingUnitType(1, "esen")
	..setRequirements("R00A")
	..setName("Mount Nightsaber")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Mount Nightsaber")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Mounts a Nightsaber so that the Huntress can ride into battle.")
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setLvlDataString("ausk", 0, 0, "e00R")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNAnimalWarTraining.blp")


@compiletime function create_w3a_A00D()
	new AbilityDefinitionCoupleInstantHippogryph('A00D')
	..setRequirements("R00A")
	..setResultingUnitType(1, "esen")
	..setPartnerUnitType(1, "e00R")
	..setName("Pick up Huntress")
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setLvlDataString("ausk", 0, 0, "e00R")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Pick up Huntress")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Picks up an Huntress so they can ride into battle.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\PassiveButtons\\PASBTNAnimalWarTraining.blp")


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM01()
	new AbilityDefinitionDreadlordCarrionSwarm('AM01')


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM02()
	new AbilityDefinitionDefend('AM02')
	..setName("Leave Detect")
	..setEditorSuffix("(OnUnitEnterLeave)")
	..setArtCaster("")
	..setIconNormal("")
	..setRace("unknown")


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM03()
	new AbilityDefinitionFireBoltcreep('AM03')
	..setName("Corrupted Blood")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Corrupted Blood")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Hurls a bolt of corrupted blood at an enemy, spawning a slime on impact that chases the target. If the target stays within 150 range for 3 seconds the slime explodes for 500 damage.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNPoisonSting.blp")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(1)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(0)
	..setCastRange(1, 800.0)
	..setCooldown(1, 15.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 80)
	..setDamage(1, 100.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 1.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 1.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "")
	..setMissileArt("")
	..setMissileSpeed(1000)
	..setRequirements("")
	..setRequirementsLevels("")
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setItemAbility(false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM04()
	new AbilityDefinitionRootAncients('AM04')


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM05()
	new AbilityDefinitionBloodMageFlameStrike('AM05')
	..setName("Nightmare")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Nightmare")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Pulls all units in the target area into the emerald nightmare, putting them to sleep for 10 seconds. Non-hero units that are not woken will turn against their allies.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNSleep.blp")
	..setBuffs(1, "BM01")
	..setEffects(1, "BM01")
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 400.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 10.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 5.0)
	..setFullDamageDealt(1, 0.0)
	..setHalfDamageDealt(1, 0.0)
	..setRequirements("")
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setItemAbility(false)
	..setArtEffect("")


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM06()
	new AbilityDefinitionTaurenChieftainEnduranceAura('AM06')
	..setName("Isolation")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Isolation")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Applies the Isolation debuff to all nearby enemies within 1800 range.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNPossession.blp")
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 1800.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "BM02")
	..setTargetsAllowed(1, "enemy,ground,air,organic")
	..setAttackSpeedIncrease(1, 0.0)
	..setMovementSpeedIncrease(1, 0.0)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setItemAbility(false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM07()
	new AbilityDefinitionRootAncients('AM07')


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM08()
	new AbilityDefinitionPermanentInvisibility('AM08')
	..setAutoAcquireAttackTargets(1, false)
	..setDurationNormal(1, -1.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, -1.0)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM09()
	new AbilityDefinitionRainofFire('AM09')
	..setDamagePerSecond(1, 0.0)
	..setNumberofWaves(1, 0)
	..setBuffs(1, "")
	..setEffects(1, "")
	..setArtTarget("")
	..setArtCaster("")
	..setMissileArt("")
	..setMaximumDamageperWave(1, 0.0)
	..setDamage(1, 0.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 1)
	..setCooldown(1, 1.0)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0a()
	new AbilityDefinitionRejuvination('AM0a')
	..setName("Invigorate")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Invigorate")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Increases health regeneration by 12.5 and mana regeneration by 1.6666666 for 12.0 seconds. Adds a seedling stack whilst active")
	..setIconNormal("UI\\Cursor\\BTNAcorn.blp")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(1)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(1)
	..setCooldown(1, 2.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 12.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 12.0)
	..setRequirements("")
	..setRequirementsLevels("")
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setItemAbility(false)
	..setManaCost(1, 25)
	..setBuffs(1, "BM03")
	..setHitPointsGained(1, 150.0)
	..setManaPointsGained(1, 20.0)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0b()
	new AbilityDefinitionTaurenChieftainWarStomp('AM0b')
	..setName("Bloom")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Bloom")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Bloom")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Bloom")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Spawns a healing cloud on each invigorated unit, healing nearby friendly units for 20 HP/s for 10 seconds in 256 radius.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "Spawns a healing cloud on each invigorated unit, healing nearby friendly units for 30 HP/s for 10 seconds in 270 radius.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "Spawns a healing cloud on each invigorated unit, healing nearby friendly units for 35 HP/s for 10 seconds in 300 radius.")
	..setTooltipLearn("Learn Bloom - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("Spawns healing clouds on invigorated units. Higher levels increase healing, duration and radius.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNHealingWave.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNHealingWave.blp")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(3)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(1)
	..setCooldown(1, 30.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 0)
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 0.0)
	..setDamage(1, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "")
	..setCooldown(2, 25.0)
	..setManaCost(2, 0)
	..setAreaofEffect(2, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(2, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(2, 0.0)
	..setDamage(2, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(2, "")
	..setCooldown(3, 20.0)
	..setManaCost(3, 0)
	..setAreaofEffect(3, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(3, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(3, 0.0)
	..setDamage(3, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(3, "")
	..setRequirements("")
	..setRequirementsLevels("")
	..setRequiredLevel(1)
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setItemAbility(false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0c()
	new AbilityDefinitionRoar('AM0c')
	..setName("Summon Treant")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Summon Treant")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Summon Treant")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Summon Treant")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Summons one Treant per seedling stack for 15s.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "Summons one Treant per seedling stack + 1 bonus Treant for 20s.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "Summons one Treant per seedling stack + 2 bonus Treants for 25s.")
	..setTooltipLearn("Learn Summon Treant - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("Summons Treants based on active seedling stacks. Higher levels increase duration and add bonus Treants.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNEnt.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNEnt.blp")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(2)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(1)
	..setLevels(3)
	..setCooldown(1, 14.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 40)
	..setDamageIncrease(1, 0.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "")
	..setCooldown(2, 12.0)
	..setManaCost(2, 55)
	..setDamageIncrease(2, 0.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(2, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(2, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(2, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(2, "")
	..setCooldown(3, 10.0)
	..setManaCost(3, 70)
	..setDamageIncrease(3, 0.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(3, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(3, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(3, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(3, "")
	..setRequirements("")
	..setRequirementsLevels("")
	..setRequiredLevel(1)
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setItemAbility(false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0d()
	new AbilityDefinitionMountainKingThunderClap('AM0d')
	..setName("Seed Burst")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Seed Burst")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Seed Burst")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Seed Burst")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Detonates all invigorated units for 75 damage in 256 radius.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "Detonates all invigorated units for 100 damage in 320 radius.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "Detonates all invigorated units for 125 damage in 350 radius.")
	..setTooltipLearn("Learn Seed Burst - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("Consumes all invigorated units, detonating each one for damage to nearby enemies. Damage and radius increases per level.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNEntanglingRoots.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNEntanglingRoots.blp")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(1)
	..setCooldown(1, 12.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 50)
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 0.0)
	..setAOEDamage(1, 0.0)
	..setAttackSpeedReduction(1, 0.0)
	..setMovementSpeedReduction(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "")
	..setCooldown(2, 10.0)
	..setManaCost(2, 65)
	..setAreaofEffect(2, 0.0)
	..setAOEDamage(2, 0.0)
	..setAttackSpeedReduction(2, 0.0)
	..setMovementSpeedReduction(2, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(2, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(2, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(2, "")
	..setCooldown(3, 8.0)
	..setManaCost(3, 80)
	..setAreaofEffect(3, 0.0)
	..setAOEDamage(3, 0.0)
	..setAttackSpeedReduction(3, 0.0)
	..setMovementSpeedReduction(3, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(3, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(3, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(3, "")
	..setRequirements("")
	..setRequirementsLevels("")
	..setRequiredLevel(1)
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setItemAbility(false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0e()
	new AbilityDefinitionAlchemistChemicalRage('AM0e')
	..setName("Moon Warrior")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Moon Warrior")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Tyrande dismounts from her tiger, gaining +30 damage and +50% attack speed for 30 seconds while summoning her tiger into battle.")
	..setTooltipLearn("Learn Moon Warrior")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("Dismount from your tiger and summon it into battle.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNPriestessOfTheMoon.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNPriestessOfTheMoon.blp")
	..setAlternateFormUnit(1, "E00S")
	..setAlternateFormUnit(2, "E00Q")
	..setAlternateFormUnit(3, "E00T")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(3)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchX(3)
	..setButtonPositionResearchY(0)
	..setCooldown(1, 60.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 75)
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 0.35)
	..setDurationHero(1, 30.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "BM04")
	..setEffects(1, "")
	..setRequirements("")
	..setRequirementsLevels("")
	..setRequiredLevel(6)
	..setLevels(1)
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setItemAbility(false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0f()
	new AbilityDefinitionIllidanChannel('AM0f')
	..setLevels(3)
	..setBaseOrderID(1, "absorb")
	..setBaseOrderID(2, "absorb")
	..setBaseOrderID(3, "absorb")
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(1, false)
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(2, false)
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(3, false)
	..setFollowThroughTime(1, 0.0)
	..setFollowThroughTime(2, 0.0)
	..setFollowThroughTime(3, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(1, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(2, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(3, 0.0)
	..setArtCaster("")
	..setArtEffect("")
	..setArtSpecial("")
	..setArtTarget("")
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchX(0)
	..setButtonPositionResearchY(0)
	..setTargetType(1, 2)
	..setTargetType(2, 2)
	..setTargetType(3, 2)
	..setOptions(1, 3)
	..setOptions(2, 3)
	..setOptions(3, 3)
	..setHotkeyNormal("Q")
	..setHotkeyLearn("Q")
	..setHotkeyTurnOff("Q")
	..setName("Starfall")
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 500.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(2, 500.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(3, 500.0)
	..setCastRange(1, 1000.0)
	..setCastRange(2, 1100.0)
	..setCastRange(3, 1200.0)
	..setCooldown(1, 40.0)
	..setCooldown(2, 35.0)
	..setCooldown(3, 30.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 125)
	..setManaCost(2, 150)
	..setManaCost(3, 175)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 6.0)
	..setDurationNormal(2, 6.0)
	..setDurationNormal(3, 6.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 6.0)
	..setDurationHero(2, 6.0)
	..setDurationHero(3, 6.0)
	..setTooltipLearn("|cffFFCC00Learn|r Starfall - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("|cff3B97D3Target Type:|r Instant Cast\n|cff3B97D3Area of Effect:|r |cffFFCC00500|r \n|cff3B97D3Cast Range:|r 1000/1100/1200\n|cff3B97D3Cooldown:|r 40/35/30\n|cff3B97D3Mana Cost:|r 125/150/175\n|cff3B97D3Duration Normal:|r |cffFFCC006|r \n|cff3B97D3Duration Hero:|r |cffFFCC006|r \n\n|cff919191Calls down stars in the target area dealing [100 / 150 / 200] damage in a 250 radius each. Stars fall faster the longer the spell channels.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Starfall  - Level 1")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Instant Cast|r\n|cff3B97D3Area of Effect:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC00500|r \n|cff3B97D3Cast Range:|r |cffFFCC001000|r/1100/1200\n|cff3B97D3Cooldown:|r |cffFFCC0040|r/35/30\n|cff3B97D3Mana Cost:|r |cffFFCC00125|r/150/175\n|cff3B97D3Duration Normal:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC006|r \n|cff3B97D3Duration Hero:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC006|r \n\n|cff919191Calls down stars in the target area dealing [100 / 150 / 200] damage in a 250 radius each. Stars fall faster the longer the spell channels.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Starfall  - Level 2")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Instant Cast|r\n|cff3B97D3Area of Effect:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC00500|r \n|cff3B97D3Cast Range:|r 1000/|cffFFCC001100|r/1200\n|cff3B97D3Cooldown:|r 40/|cffFFCC0035|r/30\n|cff3B97D3Mana Cost:|r 125/|cffFFCC00150|r/175\n|cff3B97D3Duration Normal:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC006|r \n|cff3B97D3Duration Hero:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC006|r \n\n|cff919191Calls down stars in the target area dealing [100 / 150 / 200] damage in a 250 radius each. Stars fall faster the longer the spell channels.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Starfall  - Level 3")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Instant Cast|r\n|cff3B97D3Area of Effect:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC00500|r \n|cff3B97D3Cast Range:|r 1000/1100/|cffFFCC001200|r\n|cff3B97D3Cooldown:|r 40/35/|cffFFCC0030|r\n|cff3B97D3Mana Cost:|r 125/150/|cffFFCC00175|r\n|cff3B97D3Duration Normal:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC006|r \n|cff3B97D3Duration Hero:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC006|r \n\n|cff919191Calls down stars in the target area dealing [100 / 150 / 200] damage in a 250 radius each. Stars fall faster the longer the spell channels.|r")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNStarFall.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNStarFall.blp")
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0g()
	new AbilityDefinitionIllidanChannel('AM0g')
	..setLevels(3)
	..setBaseOrderID(1, "acidbomb")
	..setBaseOrderID(2, "acidbomb")
	..setBaseOrderID(3, "acidbomb")
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(1, false)
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(2, false)
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(3, false)
	..setFollowThroughTime(1, 0.0)
	..setFollowThroughTime(2, 0.0)
	..setFollowThroughTime(3, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(1, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(2, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(3, 0.0)
	..setArtCaster("")
	..setArtEffect("")
	..setArtSpecial("")
	..setArtTarget("")
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(1)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchX(1)
	..setButtonPositionResearchY(0)
	..setTargetType(1, 2)
	..setTargetType(2, 2)
	..setTargetType(3, 2)
	..setOptions(1, 3)
	..setOptions(2, 3)
	..setOptions(3, 3)
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 425.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(2, 450.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(3, 475.0)
	..setHotkeyNormal("W")
	..setHotkeyLearn("W")
	..setHotkeyTurnOff("W")
	..setName("Elune's Grace")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNFrostBolt.blp")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNFrostBolt.blp")
	..setCooldown(1, 24.0)
	..setCooldown(2, 22.0)
	..setCooldown(3, 20.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 100)
	..setManaCost(2, 125)
	..setManaCost(3, 150)
	..setCastRange(1, 1000.0)
	..setCastRange(2, 1100.0)
	..setCastRange(3, 1200.0)
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(0)
	..setTooltipLearn("|cffFFCC00Learn|r Elune's Grace - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("|cff3B97D3Target Type:|r Instant Cast\n|cff3B97D3Cooldown:|r 24/22/20\n|cff3B97D3Mana Cost:|r 100/125/150\n|cff3B97D3Cast Range:|r 1000/1100/1200\n\n|cff919191Elune's Grace|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Elune's Grace  - Level 1")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Instant Cast|r\n|cff3B97D3Cooldown:|r |cffFFCC0024|r/22/20\n|cff3B97D3Mana Cost:|r |cffFFCC00100|r/125/150\n|cff3B97D3Cast Range:|r |cffFFCC001000|r/1100/1200\n\n|cff919191Elune's Grace|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Elune's Grace  - Level 2")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Instant Cast|r\n|cff3B97D3Cooldown:|r 24/|cffFFCC0022|r/20\n|cff3B97D3Mana Cost:|r 100/|cffFFCC00125|r/150\n|cff3B97D3Cast Range:|r 1000/|cffFFCC001100|r/1200\n\n|cff919191Elune's Grace|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Elune's Grace  - Level 3")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Instant Cast|r\n|cff3B97D3Cooldown:|r 24/22/|cffFFCC0020|r\n|cff3B97D3Mana Cost:|r 100/125/|cffFFCC00150|r\n|cff3B97D3Cast Range:|r 1000/1100/|cffFFCC001200|r\n\n|cff919191Elune's Grace|r")


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0h()
	new AbilityDefinitionSlowPoison('AM0h')
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setLevels(3)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(2)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchX(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchY(0)
	..setHotkeyNormal("E")
	..setHotkeyLearn("E")
	..setHotkeyTurnOff("E")
	..setName("Lunar Anchor")
	..setMovementSpeedFactor(1, 0.15)
	..setMovementSpeedFactor(2, 0.2)
	..setMovementSpeedFactor(3, 0.25)
	..setAttackSpeedFactor(1, 0.1)
	..setAttackSpeedFactor(2, 0.15)
	..setAttackSpeedFactor(3, 0.2)
	..setDamagePerSecond(1, 0.0)
	..setDamagePerSecond(2, 0.0)
	..setDamagePerSecond(3, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "AM0i")
	..setBuffs(2, "AM0i")
	..setBuffs(3, "AM0i")
	..setEffects(1, "AM0j")
	..setEffects(2, "AM0j")
	..setEffects(3, "AM0j")
	..setDurationNormal(1, 8.0)
	..setDurationNormal(2, 10.0)
	..setDurationNormal(3, 12.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 4.0)
	..setDurationHero(2, 5.0)
	..setDurationHero(3, 6.0)
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNMoonStone.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNMoonStone.blp")
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)
	..setTooltipLearn("|cffFFCC00Learn|r Lunar Anchor - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("|cff3B97D3Passive|r\n|cff3B97D3Movement Slow:|r 15%/20%/25%\n|cff3B97D3Attack Slow:|r 10%/15%/20%\n|cff3B97D3Magic Resist Reduced:|r 15%/20%/25%\n|cff3B97D3Duration (Units):|r 8s/10s/12s\n|cff3B97D3Duration (Heroes):|r 4s/5s/6s\n\n|cff919191Enchants Tyrande's attacks with heavy moonlight, slowing struck enemies and fundamentally shattering their magic resistance.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Lunar Anchor  - Level 1")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "|cff3B97D3Passive|r\n|cff3B97D3Movement Slow:|r |cffFFCC0015%|r/20%/25%\n|cff3B97D3Attack Slow:|r |cffFFCC0010%|r/15%/20%\n|cff3B97D3Magic Resist Reduced:|r |cffFFCC0015%|r/20%/25%\n|cff3B97D3Duration (Units):|r |cffFFCC008s|r/10s/12s\n|cff3B97D3Duration (Heroes):|r |cffFFCC004s|r/5s/6s\n\n|cff919191Enchants Tyrande's attacks with heavy moonlight, slowing struck enemies and fundamentally shattering their magic resistance.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Lunar Anchor  - Level 2")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "|cff3B97D3Passive|r\n|cff3B97D3Movement Slow:|r 15%/|cffFFCC0020%|r/25%\n|cff3B97D3Attack Slow:|r 10%/|cffFFCC0015%|r/20%\n|cff3B97D3Magic Resist Reduced:|r 15%/|cffFFCC0020%|r/25%\n|cff3B97D3Duration (Units):|r 8s/|cffFFCC0010s|r/12s\n|cff3B97D3Duration (Heroes):|r 4s/|cffFFCC005s|r/6s\n\n|cff919191Enchants Tyrande's attacks with heavy moonlight, slowing struck enemies and fundamentally shattering their magic resistance.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Lunar Anchor  - Level 3")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "|cff3B97D3Passive|r\n|cff3B97D3Movement Slow:|r 15%/20%/|cffFFCC0025%|r\n|cff3B97D3Attack Slow:|r 10%/15%/|cffFFCC0020%|r\n|cff3B97D3Magic Resist Reduced:|r 15%/20%/|cffFFCC0025%|r\n|cff3B97D3Duration (Units):|r 8s/10s/|cffFFCC0012s|r\n|cff3B97D3Duration (Heroes):|r 4s/5s/|cffFFCC006s|r\n\n|cff919191Enchants Tyrande's attacks with heavy moonlight, slowing struck enemies and fundamentally shattering their magic resistance.|r")


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0k()
	new AbilityDefinitionRoar('AM0k')
	..setName("Hibernate")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Hibernate")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Hibernate")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Hibernate")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Ursoc hibernates for 4s, healing 30% max HP + 125 and gaining +20 armor. Cannot act while hibernating.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "Ursoc hibernates for 4s, healing 40% max HP + 175 and gaining +20 armor. Cannot act while hibernating.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "Ursoc hibernates for 4s, healing 50% max HP + 250 and gaining +20 armor. Cannot act while hibernating.")
	..setTooltipLearn("Learn Hibernate")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("Ursoc hibernates for 4 seconds, rapidly healing and gaining bonus armor. Cannot act while hibernating.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNSleep.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNSleep.blp")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(1)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(0)
	..setCooldown(1, 20.0)
	..setCooldown(2, 18.0)
	..setCooldown(3, 16.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 50)
	..setManaCost(2, 50)
	..setManaCost(3, 50)
	..setDamageIncrease(1, 0.0)
	..setDamageIncrease(2, 0.0)
	..setDamageIncrease(3, 0.0)
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 0.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "")
	..setLevels(3)
	..setRequiredLevel(1)
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)
	..setRequirements("")
	..setRequirementsLevels("")
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setItemAbility(false)
	..setHotkeyLearn("R")


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0l()
	new AbilityDefinitionMountainKingThunderBolt('AM0l')
	..setLevels(3)
	..setName("Mauling Charge")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Mauling Charge")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Mauling Charge")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Mauling Charge")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Ursoc charges at the target enemy dealing 100 damage and stunning for 2 seconds, half on heroes.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "Ursoc charges at the target enemy dealing 175 damage and stunning for 3 seconds, half on heroes.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "Ursoc charges at the target enemy dealing 250 damage and stunning for 4 seconds, half on heroes.")
	..setTooltipLearn("Learn Mauling Charge - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("Ursoc charges at the target enemy dealing damage and stunning them. |n|n|cffffcc00Level 1|r - <AHtb,DataA1> damage, <AHtb,Dur1> second stun. |n|cffffcc00Level 2|r - <AHtb,DataA2> damage, <AHtb,Dur2> second stun. |n|cffffcc00Level 3|r - <AHtb,DataA3> damage, <AHtb,Dur3> second stun.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCharge.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCharge.blp")
	..setIconTurnOff("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtonsDisabled\\DISBTNCharge.blp")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(0)
	..setCooldown(1, 12.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 60)
	..setDamage(1, 100.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 2.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 1.0)
	..setCastRange(1, 700.0)
	..setCooldown(2, 10.0)
	..setManaCost(2, 70)
	..setDamage(2, 175.0)
	..setDurationNormal(2, 3.0)
	..setDurationHero(2, 1.5)
	..setCastRange(2, 800.0)
	..setCooldown(3, 8.0)
	..setManaCost(3, 80)
	..setDamage(3, 250.0)
	..setDurationNormal(3, 4.0)
	..setDurationHero(3, 2.0)
	..setCastRange(3, 900.0)
	..setBuffs(1, "BM06")
	..setBuffs(2, "BM06")
	..setBuffs(3, "BM06")
	..setRequirements("")
	..setRequirementsLevels("")
	..setRequiredLevel(1)
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setItemAbility(false)

	..setManaCost(1, 60)

	..setDurationNormal(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 0.0)

	..setRequirements("")

	..setRequiredLevel(1)
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)

	..setButtonPositionNormalY(0)

	..setManaCost(1, 60)
	..setAreaofEffect(1, 350.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 0.0)
	..setDurationHero(1, 0.0)
	..setFullDamageDealt(1, 0.0)
	..setHalfDamageDealt(1, 0.0)
	..setRequirements("")

	..setItemAbility(false)

	..setAreaEffect("")
	..setBuffs(1, "")
	..setBuffs(2, "")
	..setBuffs(3, "")
	..setEffects(1, "")
	..setEffects(2, "")
	..setEffects(3, "")
	..setArtEffect("")

	new AbilityDefinitionIllidanChannel('AM0q')
	..setLevels(3)
	..setBaseOrderID(1, "acolyteharvest")
	..setBaseOrderID(2, "acolyteharvest")
	..setBaseOrderID(3, "acolyteharvest")
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(1, false)
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(2, false)
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(3, false)
	..setFollowThroughTime(1, 0.0)
	..setFollowThroughTime(2, 0.0)
	..setFollowThroughTime(3, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(1, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(2, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(3, 0.0)
	..setOptions(1, 1)
	..setOptions(2, 1)
	..setOptions(3, 1)
	..setArtCaster("")
	..setArtEffect("")
	..setArtSpecial("")
	..setArtTarget("")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(0)
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCharm.blp")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Cast Arcane Blast")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Fires a concentrated bolt of arcane energy that damages all enemies in its path.")
	..setCooldown(1, 8.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 125)
	..setCastRange(1, 900.0)
	..setTargetType(1, 2)
	..setHeroAbility(false)

	..setName("Thick Bark")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Thick Bark")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Reduces each attack's damage by 10.0 minimum damage taken off 5.0% per hit.")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNEatTree.blp")
	..setMinimumDamage(1, 5.0)
	..setChancetoReduceDamage(1, 1.0)
	..setIgnoredDamage(1, 10.0)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(3)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setItemAbility(false)
	..setRequirements("R000")

	new AbilityDefinitionIllidanChannel('AM0v')
	..setLevels(1)
	..setBaseOrderID(1, "whirlwind")
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(1, false)
	..setFollowThroughTime(1, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(1, 0.0)
	..setOptions(1, 1)
	..setArtCaster("")
	..setArtEffect("")
	..setArtSpecial("")
	..setArtTarget("")
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(2)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(0)
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNPoisonArrow.blp")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Viper Sting")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Fires a venom-tipped arrow in a straight line. Enemies struck take physical puncture damage and are infected with a lethal toxin that slows movement speed and inflicts nature damage over time.")
	..setCooldown(1, 10.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 60)
	..setCastRange(1, 1100.0)
	..setTargetType(1, 2)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0w()
	new AbilityDefinitionIllidanChannel('AM0w')
	..setBaseOrderID(1, "ambush")
	..setBaseOrderID(2, "ambush")
	..setBaseOrderID(3, "ambush")
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(1, false)
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(2, false)
	..setDisableOtherAbilities(3, false)
	..setFollowThroughTime(1, 0.0)
	..setFollowThroughTime(2, 0.0)
	..setFollowThroughTime(3, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(1, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(2, 0.0)
	..setArtDuration(3, 0.0)
	..setArtCaster("")
	..setArtEffect("")
	..setArtSpecial("")
	..setArtTarget("")
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setLevels(3)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(0)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchX(0)
	..setButtonPositionResearchY(0)
	..setHotkeyNormal("Q")
	..setHotkeyLearn("Q")
	..setHotkeyTurnOff("Q")
	..setName("Spinning Glaive")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNFanOfKnives.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNFanOfKnives.blp")
	..setLevelSkipRequirement(2)
	..setCastRange(1, 1000.0)
	..setCastRange(2, 1000.0)
	..setCastRange(3, 1000.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 90)
	..setManaCost(2, 100)
	..setManaCost(3, 110)
	..setCooldown(1, 12.5)
	..setCooldown(2, 11.0)
	..setCooldown(3, 9.5)
	..setOptions(1, 1)
	..setOptions(2, 1)
	..setOptions(3, 1)
	..setTargetType(1, 2)
	..setTargetType(2, 2)
	..setTargetType(3, 2)
	..setTooltipLearn("|cffFFCC00Learn|r Spinning Glaive - [|cffffcc00Level %d|r]")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("|cff3B97D3Target Type:|r Point Target\n|cff3B97D3Damage per Second:|r 35/50/65\n|cff3B97D3Movement Slow:|r 30%/35%/40%\n|cff3B97D3Denial Duration:|r |cffFFCC005s|r \n\n|cff919191Hurls a massive, spinning glaive exactly 300 units in the targeted direction. Upon arrival, the blade zones out the area, continuously grinding and slowing nearby enemies.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Spinning Glaive  - Level 1")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Point Target|r\n|cff3B97D3Damage per Second:|r |cffFFCC0035|r/50/65\n|cff3B97D3Movement Slow:|r |cffFFCC0030%|r/35%/40%\n|cff3B97D3Denial Duration:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC005s|r \n\n|cff919191Hurls a massive, spinning glaive exactly 300 units in the targeted direction. Upon arrival, the blade zones out the area, continuously grinding and slowing nearby enemies.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Spinning Glaive  - Level 2")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Point Target|r\n|cff3B97D3Damage per Second:|r 35/|cffFFCC0050|r/65\n|cff3B97D3Movement Slow:|r 30%/|cffFFCC0035%|r/40%\n|cff3B97D3Denial Duration:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC005s|r \n\n|cff919191Hurls a massive, spinning glaive exactly 300 units in the targeted direction. Upon arrival, the blade zones out the area, continuously grinding and slowing nearby enemies.|r")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Spinning Glaive  - Level 3")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "|cff3B97D3Target Type: |cffFFCC00Point Target|r\n|cff3B97D3Damage per Second:|r 35/50/|cffFFCC0065|r\n|cff3B97D3Movement Slow:|r 30%/35%/|cffFFCC0040%|r\n|cff3B97D3Denial Duration:|r |cffFFCC00|cffFFCC005s|r \n\n|cff919191Hurls a massive, spinning glaive exactly 300 units in the targeted direction. Upon arrival, the blade zones out the area, continuously grinding and slowing nearby enemies.|r")


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0x()
	new AbilityDefinitionSlow('AM0x')
	..setHeroAbility(false)
	..setManaCost(1, 0)
	..setCooldown(1, 0.0)
	..setCastRange(1, 99999.0)
	..setCheckDependencies(false)
	..setLevels(3)
	..setMovementSpeedFactor(1, 0.3)
	..setMovementSpeedFactor(2, 0.35)
	..setMovementSpeedFactor(3, 0.4)
	..setAttackSpeedFactor(1, 0.0)
	..setAttackSpeedFactor(2, 0.0)
	..setAttackSpeedFactor(3, 0.0)
	..setDurationNormal(1, 1.5)
	..setDurationNormal(2, 1.5)
	..setDurationNormal(3, 1.5)
	..setDurationHero(1, 1.5)
	..setDurationHero(2, 1.5)
	..setDurationHero(3, 1.5)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0y()
	new AbilityDefinitionHardenedSkin('AM0y')
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setLevels(3)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(2)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchX(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchY(0)
	..setHotkeyNormal("E")
	..setHotkeyLearn("E")
	..setHotkeyTurnOff("E")
	..setIconNormal("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNWarden2.blp")
	..setIconResearch("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNWarden2.blp")
	..setName("Vengeful Retribution")
	..setRequirements("")
	..setTooltipLearn("Learn Vengeful Retribution")
	..setTooltipLearnExtended("The Warden channels her pain into pure malice. Every damage threshold taken automatically spawns a short-lived Vengeful Spirit to assault nearby enemies.")
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Vengeful Retribution - [|cffffcc00Level 1|r]")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "The Warden channels her pain into pure malice. Every 150 damage taken automatically spawns a short-lived Vengeful Spirit to assault nearby enemies.")
	..setChancetoReduceDamage(1, 0.0)
	..setIgnoredDamage(1, 0.0)
	..setMinimumDamage(1, 0.0)
	..setIncludeMeleeDamage(1, false)
	..setIncludeRangedDamage(1, false)
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Vengeful Retribution - [|cffffcc00Level 2|r]")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "The Warden channels her pain into pure malice. Every 130 damage taken automatically spawns a short-lived Vengeful Spirit to assault nearby enemies.")
	..setChancetoReduceDamage(2, 0.0)
	..setIgnoredDamage(2, 0.0)
	..setMinimumDamage(2, 0.0)
	..setIncludeMeleeDamage(2, false)
	..setIncludeRangedDamage(2, false)
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Vengeful Retribution - [|cffffcc00Level 3|r]")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "The Warden channels her pain into pure malice. Every 110 damage taken automatically spawns a short-lived Vengeful Spirit to assault nearby enemies.")
	..setChancetoReduceDamage(3, 0.0)
	..setIgnoredDamage(3, 0.0)
	..setMinimumDamage(3, 0.0)
	..setIncludeMeleeDamage(3, false)
	..setIncludeRangedDamage(3, false)


@compiletime function create_w3a_AM0z()
	new AbilityDefinitionWardenBlink('AM0z')
	..setHeroAbility(true)
	..setLevels(3)
	..setButtonPositionNormalX(1)
	..setButtonPositionNormalY(2)
	..setButtonPositionResearchX(1)
	..setButtonPositionResearchY(0)
	..setHotkeyNormal("W")
	..setHotkeyLearn("W")
	..setHotkeyTurnOff("W")
	..setName("Blink")
	..setCastRange(1, 400.0)
	..setCastRange(2, 600.0)
	..setCastRange(3, 800.0)
	..setCooldown(1, 12.0)
	..setCooldown(2, 9.0)
	..setCooldown(3, 6.0)
	..setManaCost(1, 50)
	..setManaCost(2, 50)
	..setManaCost(3, 50)
	..setTooltipNormal(1, "Blink - [|cffffcc00Level 1|r]")
	..setTooltipNormal(2, "Blink - [|cffffcc00Level 2|r]")
	..setTooltipNormal(3, "Blink - [|cffffcc00Level 3|r]")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(1, "Short distance teleportation that allows the Warden to pass in and out of combat safely.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(2, "Short distance teleportation that allows the Warden to pass in and out of combat safely.")
	..setTooltipNormalExtended(3, "Short distance teleportation that allows the Warden to pass in and out of combat safely.")


// Original Table (contains all modified default/melee objects)
// These are emitted when createObjectDefinition uses the same base/new id.

@compiletime function create_w3a_AIgo()
	new AbilityDefinitionGiveGold('AIgo')
	..setGoldGiven(1, 2500)


@compiletime function create_w3a_ANhs()
	new AbilityDefinitionAlchemistHealingSpray('ANhs')
	..setMissileArt("Abilities\\Spells\\Items\\AIhe\\AIheTarget.mdl")
